mapper.sql: id, conversation_id, user_id, peer_user_id, member_role, member_status, last_read_seq, last_received_seq, unread_count, pinned, mute, hidden, last_visible_seq, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT m.id, m.conversation_id, m.user_id, m.peer_user_id, m.member_role, m.member_status, m.last_read_seq, m.last_received_seq, m.unread_count, m.pinned, m.mute, m.hidden, m.last_visible_seq, m.created_at, m.updated_at, c.current_seq, c.last_message_id, c.last_message_at FROM bluenote_im.im_conversation_member m JOIN bluenote_im.im_conversation c ON c.conversation_id = m.conversation_id WHERE m.conversation_id = #{conversationId} AND m.user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(unread_count), 0) FROM bluenote_im.im_conversation_member WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND hidden = 0 AND member_status = 'NORMAL'
